task_completion.description: Document pregnancy diagnosis (ICD-10 O09, Z33, or Z34) as an active condition for patient Luna.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record in GNU Health showing patient Luna with an active condition/diagnosis code starting with O09, Z33, or Z34.

task_completion.description: Document occupational chemical exposure hazard (ICD-10 Z57.x) as an active condition for patient Luna.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record in GNU Health showing patient Luna with an active condition/diagnosis code starting with Z57 (e.g., Z57.5 for occupational exposure to toxic agents).

task_completion.description: Prescribe a prenatal supplement (Folic Acid, Iron, or Prenatal Vitamin) for patient Luna.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved prescription record in GNU Health for patient Luna containing a medication such as Folic Acid, Iron, or Prenatal Vitamin.

task_completion.description: Order at least two baseline maternity lab tests for patient Luna.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Saved lab test request records in GNU Health for patient Luna showing at least two tests ordered (e.g., CBC, Urinalysis, Blood typing, hCG).

task_completion.description: Create a Lifestyle record with a note containing 'work restriction' or 'reassignment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record in the Lifestyle section of patient Luna in GNU Health, with a note or description explicitly containing the text 'work restriction' or 'reassignment'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health graphical user interface being navigated and forms being filled out.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the expected appearance of GNU Health (Tryton client), not a text editor or a mocked web page.

integrity.description: The agent properly filled out the specific fields in the application rather than pasting the entire task description into a single text box.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into appropriate fields (e.g., conditions, prescriptions, lab tests, lifestyle notes) rather than a single large text area.
